name: @pcvera-puzzles/hexagonal-grids
description: CSS utilities for creating hexagonal grid layouts with support for axial, offset, cube, and doubled coordinate systems
author: Peter Vera

scripts.build: postcss src/hexagon.css -o dist/hexagon.css && postcss src/axial-grid.css -o dist/axial-grid.css && postcss src/offset-grid.css -o dist/offset-grid.css
